title: Reversible one-way valve
abstract: A reversible one-way valve (10, 100, 200) comprising a one-way valve structure (12); a receptacle (14) for the one-way valve structure (12); and connecting means (16, 202) connecting the one-way valve structure (12) to the receptacle (14). The connecting (16, 202) means may be manipulated such that the one-way valve structure (12) may be inverted relative to its original biased position and the one-way valve structure (12) is able to be received within the receptacle (14) when in both its original biased position and in its inverted position.
claims: Claims We Claim: 1 . A reversible one-way valve comprising: a one-way valve structure; a receptacle for the one-way valve structure; and connecting means connecting the one-way valve structure to the receptacle, where the connecting means may be manipulated such that the one-way valve structure may be inverted relative to its original biased position and the one-way valve structure is able to be received within the receptacle when in both its original biased position and in its inverted position. 2. A reversible one-way valve according to claim 1 , where the connecting means has a through slot provided therein, the through slot allowing the connecting means to twist so as to allow for inversion of the one-way valve structure. 3. A reversible one-way valve according to claim 2, where the through slot has flared ends. 4. A reversible one way valve according to claim 2 or claim 3, where the through slot has a pair of notches positioned directly opposite one another relative to the through slot, such that when the through slot is twisted the notches mate and thereby lock the oneway valve structure in its inverted position. 5. A reversible one-way valve according to claim 2 or claim 3, where the through slot divides the connecting means into a first connecting arm and a second connecting arm, the first connecting arm having a length greater than the length of the second connecting arm. 6. A reversible one-way valve according to claim 5, where the first connecting arm and the second connecting arm both have a plurality of ribs provided thereon, the ribs operable to engage each other when the one-way valve is in its inverted position. 7. A reversible one-way valve according to any preceding claim, further comprising a cap and a cap connecting means, the cap connecting means operable to connect the cap to the receptacle. 8. A reversible one-way valve according to claim 7, where the cap connecting means has a plurality of apertures provided therein to facilitate manipulation of the cap connecting means. 9. A reversible one-way valve according to any preceding claim, where the receptacle includes a welding insert, the welding insert operable to facilitate a permanent connection to an inflatable object. 10. A reversible one-way valve according to claim 9, where the welding insert has a plurality of stepped teeth located about its perimeter. 1 1 . A reversible one-way valve according to any preceding claim, where the connecting means includes a sliding sleeve, the sliding sleeve able to move to a position along the connecting means which maintains the one-way valve in its inverted position. 12. A reversible one-way valve according to any preceding claim, where the one-way valve structure has an "O"-ring, the "O"-ring operable to create an interference fit between the one-way valve structure and the receptacle when the one-way valve structure is received therein. 13. A self-inflating mattress comprising: a reversible one-way valve as claimed in any one of claims 1 to 12; and an enclosure having a self-inflating foam member, where, when the reversible one-way valve structure is in its original biased position, the self-inflating foam member is able to draw air through the reversible one-way valve structure to inflate the mattress and when the reversible one-way valve structure is in its inverted position, and following at least partial deflation of the self-inflating foam member, the one-way valve structure operates to prevent the self-inflating foam member from re-inflating by drawing air back through the reversible one-way valve.
